creator: bitbucket63-it@yahoo.com
text:
I installed deskutils/calibre and it ran. I tried searching, adding a pdf to the library, and reading the manual. It kept throwing warnings like

QStandardPaths: XDG_RUNTIME_DIR not set, defaulting to '/tmp/runtime-jtm'
No suitable graphics backend found

but it never crashed and as far as I could tell was functioning properly.

I have not updated my ports tree so it's from the same version as before.
